title: An Act to Establish a University of Maine Medical School and to Dedicate Funds from Raising the Cigarette Tax to the School
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, Mar 18, 2025
last_house_action: 2/4/2025 - The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on EDUCATION AND CULTURAL AFFAIRS . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 3/18/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)

actions.description: Committee on EDUCATION AND CULTURAL AFFAIRS suggested and ordered printed REFERENCE to the Committee on EDUCATION AND CULTURAL AFFAIRS Ordered sent down forthwith for concurrence
The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on EDUCATION AND CULTURAL AFFAIRS . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
